positive: Minimalist black and white geometric portrait of a stylized wolf howling at a crescent moon, incorporating deep indigo watercolor splashes and glowing constellations. The wolf silhouette must be clean and crisp, facing upward into a deep midnight sky. Use high contrast linework, negative space composition, and a dramatic chiaroscuro effect. Designed for screen printing on apparel, vectorized, perfect for merchandise, clean lines, bold artwork, ethereal atmosphere, modern tattoo style, symmetrical.
